description: CLI interface specification for gitlode
applyTo: "src/cli/**"

# CLI Interface Instructions

This file is a GitHub Copilot routing shim.

Canonical source:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/cli.md`

For related work, also read:

- `packages/gitlode/docs/usage.md` when user-facing workflows, examples, help text, warnings, or errors are affected
- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/configuration.md` when config shape, path resolution, or precedence is affected
- `packages/gitlode/docs/design/schema.md` when output shape or file-format behavior is affected

Do not treat this file as an independent source of truth.
